ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stops" (
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stop */,
  "stop_name" TEXT /* Name of the stop */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location description of the stop */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the stop */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the stop */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Zone of the stop */,
  "is_terminal" INTEGER /* Whether the stop is a terminal */,
  "is_accessible" INTEGER /* Whether the stop is accessible for passengers with disabilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "route_name" TEXT /* Name of the route */,
  "mode_of_transport" TEXT /* Mode of transport (e.g., bus, train, subway) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the route */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Operator of the route */,
  "route_color" TEXT /* Color of the route for display purposes */,
  "route_text_color" TEXT /* Text color of the route for display purposes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fare_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fare category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the fare category (e.g., peak, low, senior) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fare category */,
  "category_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each fare category */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of each fare category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fares" (
  "fare_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fare entry */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Route ID */,
  "from_stop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the starting stop */,
  "to_stop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination stop */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fare category */,
  "fare_amount" REAL /* Fare amount */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the fare became effective */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance between stops */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the fare */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fare_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fares_to_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_stop_id") REFERENCES stops ("stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fares_from_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_stop_id") REFERENCES stops ("stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fares_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES fare_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fares_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fare_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fare history entry */,
  "fare_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fare entry */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Route ID */,
  "from_stop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the starting stop */,
  "to_stop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the destination stop */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fare category */,
  "fare_amount" REAL /* Fare amount */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the fare became effective */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the fare was discontinued */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for fare change */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* User who approved the fare change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fare_history_from_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_stop_id") REFERENCES stops ("stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fare_history_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fare_history_to_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_stop_id") REFERENCES stops ("stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fare_history_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fare_history_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES fare_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, operator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the access event */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the transaction */,
  "fare_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fare entry */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "amount_paid" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method (e.g., cash, card, mobile) */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., payment, refund) */,
  "payment_gateway" TEXT /* Payment gateway used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_fare_id FOREIGN KEY ("fare_id") REFERENCES fares ("fare_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pass_types" (
  "pass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pass type */,
  "pass_name" TEXT /* Name of the pass type (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the pass type */,
  "pass_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each pass type */,
  "validity_days" INTEGER /* Number of days each pass type is valid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pass_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passes" (
  "pass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pass */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user holding the pass */,
  "pass_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pass type */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the pass was issued */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date the pass expires */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the pass (e.g., active, expired) */,
  "pass_status" TEXT /* Status of the pass (e.g., active, expired, suspended) */,
  "activation_date" TEXT /* Date when the pass was activated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pass_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passes_pass_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("pass_type_id") REFERENCES pass_types ("pass_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pass_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pass transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the transaction */,
  "pass_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pass */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "amount_paid" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method (e.g., cash, card, mobile) */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., activation, renewal) */,
  "payment_gateway" TEXT /* Payment gateway used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pass_transactions_pass_id FOREIGN KEY ("pass_id") REFERENCES passes ("pass_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pass_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "route_stops" (
  "route_stop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route stop */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route */,
  "stop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stop */,
  "sequence" INTEGER /* Sequence number of the stop along the route */,
  "arrival_time" TEXT /* Expected arrival time at the stop */,
  "departure_time" TEXT /* Expected departure time from the stop */,
  "stop_sequence" INTEGER /* Sequence of stops along the route */,
  "time_between_stops" TEXT /* Time between stops along the route */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_stop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_stops_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_stops_stop_id FOREIGN KEY ("stop_id") REFERENCES stops ("stop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fare_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fare policy */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the fare policy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fare policy */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the policy became effective */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the policy ends */,
  "policy_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each fare policy */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Detailed description of each fare policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id")
)
